name: loops
description: Send emails, manage contacts, and trigger events with Loops — the email platform for SaaS.

interface.longDescription: Use skills for integrating Loops in your codebase with API, CLI, LMX email markup, and deliverability.
defaultPrompt: Add a contact to Loops from my backend.
Send a transactional email with the Loops API.
Design a new welcome email with an imagegen reference, then write it in LMX.
